South African Teen Selected for MIT Jameel Clinic AI and Health Summer Bootcamp
description: Sixteen-year-old South African student Reatlegile Rammuki has been selected for the MIT Jameel Clinic AI and Health Summer Bootcamp at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology in Cambridge, Massachusetts — a highly competitive global programme exploring how artificial intelligence can be applied to real-world healthcare challenges. The bootcamp, scheduled for July, brings together selected young minds [...]

title: Google Drive gets smarter document scanner with AI features and multi-page support
description: Google has upgraded its Drive document scanner for Android with AI-powered multi-page scanning, duplicate page detection and automatic image enhancement for faster and smarter document digitisation.
